g.text: 01 / PEGELRANK
ELO ranking app for Beer Pong & Flunkyball friend groups, with a hand-drawn dark-mode UI.
Custom rank tiers, full match history and live auth, built on Supabase and deployed on Vercel.
REACT · SUPABASE · TAILWIND · VERCEL
02 / FLAPPY SANTA
Java arcade game built from scratch, with a custom game loop and clean OOP architecture.
Festive pixel sprites throughout — won 1st place at a university programming competition.
JAVA · SWING · AWT · GAME DEV
03 / POKÉTYPE
Native macOS app for checking Pokémon type effectiveness, fully offline and in German.
Live search plus a full damage matrix covering every type interaction through Generation 6.
SWIFT · SWIFTUI · MACOS
04 / SOCKET SCANNER
Minimal TCP port scanner written in pure C, working directly against raw POSIX sockets.
Handles banner grabbing and OS fingerprinting — no external libraries, no abstractions.
C · POSIX · NETWORKING
05 / TAGESSCHAU APP
Flutter news app pulling live articles straight from the Tagesschau REST API.
Handles loading states, image previews, topic tags and timestamp formatting.
FLUTTER · DART · REST API
06 / REGENSBURG MAP
Flutter map app rendering a zoomable OpenStreetMap view of Regensburg.
Multiple location categories, custom map icons and a detail sheet on marker tap.
FLUTTER · DART · OPENSTREETMAP
07 / R/PLACE 2-PLAYER
Collaborative pixel canvas inspired by Reddit's r/place, built for exactly two players.
A shared 10×10 canvas — pick a color, tap a pixel, changes sync instantly on both devices.
FLUTTER · DART · SUPABASE · REALTIME
08 / POKÉBATTLE LED EDITION
Turn-based Pokémon battle game running on an 8×8 LED matrix, written in pure C for the ATmega328P.
Hardware-driven rendering via 74HC595 shift registers, joystick input, real-time HP tracking at ~500Hz.
C · ATMEGA328P · AVR · EMBEDDED
09 / MEME ESOLANG — IN PROGRESS
Work-in-progress esoteric language built around German internet meme syntax.
Custom lexer & parser generate a full AST, transpiled into optimized C and natively compiled via GCC/Clang.
C · LEXER/PARSER · AST · COMPILER · WIP
